parameters.text:
={{ 'Is this email an RFQ bid response from a vendor?
'+ 'Subject: ' + $json.subject + '
'+ 'From: ' + $json.from_addr + '
'+ 'Body snippet: ' + $json.snippet.substring(0,500) + '
'+ 'Has attachments: ' + $json.has_attachments + '
'+ 'Return JSON: {"is_rfq_response":boolean,"rfq_reference":"MR-XXXX-XXX or null","vendor_email":"email","has_attachments":boolean,"confidence":"high/medium/low"}' }}

options.systemMessage: You classify procurement emails. Return ONLY valid JSON, no explanation.

parameters.subject: ={{ '[TEST] [RFQ Monitor] Unknown reference: ' + $('Parse Classification').first().json.rfq_reference }}
parameters.message:
={{ '

Received a vendor email that could not be matched to an RFQ. Reference: ' + $('Parse Classification').first().json.rfq_reference + '

From: ' + $('Extract Email Fields').first().json.from_addr + '

Subject: ' + $('Extract Email Fields').first().json.subject + '

' }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '[TEST] [RFQ Monitor] Unknown vendor for ' + $('Check RFQ Found').first().json.rfq_reference }}
parameters.message:
={{ '

Vendor email ' + $('Parse Classification').first().json.vendor_email + ' responded to RFQ ' + $('Check RFQ Found').first().json.rfq_reference + ' but is not listed as a vendor for this RFQ.

' }}

options.systemMessage: You extract structured bid data from vendor emails for Sarooj Construction Company, Oman. Return ONLY valid JSON. No markdown, no explanation, no backticks.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ rfq_id: $('Check RFQ Found').first().json.rfq_id, vendor_name: ($('Check Vendor Found').first().json.contact_person || $('Extract Email Fields').first().json.from_addr || 'Unknown Vendor'), rfq_vendor_id: $('Check Vendor Found').first().json.id, vendor_id: $('Check Vendor Found').first().json.vendor_id, status: 'ai_extracted_pending_review', original_email_id: $('Extract Email Fields').first().json.msg_id, original_email_body: $('Extract Email Fields').first().json.body, quotation_reference: $json.extracted.quotation_reference, quotation_date: $json.extracted.quotation_date, currency: $json.extracted.currency || 'OMR', vat_treatment: $json.extracted.vat_treatment, payment_structure: $json.extracted.payment_structure, payment_method: $json.extracted.payment_method, credit_days: $json.extracted.credit_days, delivery_lead_time_days: $json.extracted.delivery_lead_time_days, validity_days: $json.extracted.validity_days, notes: $json.extracted.general_notes, initial_quote_price_omr: $json.initial_quote_price_omr, subtotal_ex_vat_omr: $json.subtotal_ex_vat_omr, vat_amount_omr: $json.vat_amount_omr, total_inc_vat_omr: $json.total_inc_vat_omr, ai_extraction_confidence: $json.extracted.overall_confidence, ai_extraction_notes: $json.extracted.extraction_notes }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify($('Calculate Totals').first().json.bid_items.map(item => ({ bid_id: $('POST Bid').first().json.bid_id, rfq_item_id: item.rfq_item_id, sap_item_number: item.sap_item_number, description: item.description, original_unit_price: item.unit_price, original_currency: item.currency, unit_price_omr: item.unit_price_omr, total_price_omr: item.total_price_omr, ai_confidence: item.ai_confidence, ai_confidence_reason: item.notes }))) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ response_received: true, response_at: new Date().toISOString(), status: 'responded' }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Thank you — ' + $('Check RFQ Found').first().json.rfq_reference + ' Response Received' }}
parameters.message:
={{ '

Dear ' + ($('Check Vendor Found').first().json.contact_person || 'Procurement Manager') + ',

Thank you for your quotation for ' + $('Check RFQ Found').first().json.rfq_reference + '. We have received your submission and will review it shortly.

Best regards,
Procurement Team
Sarooj Construction Company

' }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '[TEST] [RFQ Response] Bid received for ' + $('Check RFQ Found').first().json.rfq_reference }}
parameters.message:
={{ '

A vendor has submitted a bid for ' + $('Check RFQ Found').first().json.rfq_reference + ' (' + $('Check RFQ Found').first().json.title + ').

AI extracted ' + ($('Calculate Totals').first().json.bid_items || []).length + ' item prices. Total (OMR): ' + $('Calculate Totals').first().json.total_inc_vat_omr + '. Confidence: ' + $('Calculate Totals').first().json.extracted.overall_confidence + '.

Review at: https://sarooj-vendor-hub.vercel.app/rfq/' + $('Check RFQ Found').first().json.rfq_id + '

' }}

parameters.text: = Classify each response attachment filename into one of: priced_boq, technical_submission, covering_letter, other. Return ONLY a JSON array, e.g. [{"filename":"example.pdf","type":"priced_boq"}].

options.systemMessage: You classify document filenames for procurement. Return ONLY a JSON array, no explanation.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ response_received: true, response_at: new Date().toISOString(), status: 'responded', response_drive_url: 'https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/' + $('Create Response Subfolder').first().json.id }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Thank you — ' + $('Check RFQ Found').first().json.rfq_reference + ' Submission Received' }}
parameters.message:
={{ '

Dear ' + ($('Check Vendor Found').first().json.contact_person || 'Procurement Manager') + ',

Thank you for your submission for ' + $('Check RFQ Found').first().json.rfq_reference + '. Your documents have been received and are under review.

Best regards,
Procurement Team
Sarooj Construction Company

' }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '[TEST] [Subcontract Response] Submission for ' + $('Check RFQ Found').first().json.rfq_reference }}
parameters.message:
={{ '

Vendor ' + $('Parse Classification').first().json.vendor_email + ' submitted documents for ' + $('Check RFQ Found').first().json.rfq_reference + '.

Documents filed to: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/' + $('Create Response Subfolder').first().json.id + '

' }}
